Poid.name: PIN_FLD_USERID
Poid.Doc: The account poid (i.e. The login account poid)

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_DUE_T
Timestamp.Doc: The new due date for the action

Int.name: PIN_FLD_DAYS
Int.Doc: The slipdays for the following actions.Three options PIN_FLD_DAYS=0 ( or non-existant), won't touch the following actions.PIN_FLD_DAYS>0, The actual number of days to slip the following actions.PIN_FLD_DAYS less than 0 cancel the following actions

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
